fields.name: Supplier
fields.description: Primary supplier or vendor party name

fields.name: ContractType
fields.description: Type of contract (e.g., Master Service Agreement, NDA, Statement of Work, Purchase Agreement)

fields.name: EffectiveDate
fields.description: Contract start or effective date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

fields.name: ExpirationDate
fields.description: Contract end or expiration date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

fields.name: ContractValue
fields.description: Total contract value or maximum commitment amount

fields.name: BusinessEntity
fields.description: Internal company entity or business unit this contract is associated with

fields.name: GoverningLaw
fields.description: State or jurisdiction governing this contract

fields.name: PaymentTerms
fields.description: Payment terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 60, upon delivery)

fields.name: AutoRenewal
fields.description: Whether the contract contains an auto-renewal clause. Return PRESENT or NOT_FOUND.

fields.name: LiabilityCap
fields.description: Whether the contract contains a liability cap clause. Return PRESENT or NOT_FOUND.

fields.name: TerminationClause
fields.description: Whether the contract contains a termination for convenience clause. Return PRESENT or NOT_FOUND.
